/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_if__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/motor_if/libmotor_if__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/motor_if__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/motor_if/srv/_motor_pos_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build/motor_if:/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libmotor_if__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libmotor_if__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib
